name: TOP_TECHCLASS1_LAST_3Y
description: Top TechnologyClass1 categorys last last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1)<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN tc.name AS technologyclass1, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..5] AS example_targetpairs
ORDER BY targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, technologyclass1
LIMIT 10

examples: Across target-pair combinations disclosed in the last three years, which TechnologyClass1 categories appear most frequently? Please provide the top 10 and example target pairs.
In the most recent three-year window, which TechnologyClass1 classes are most common across all target-pair combinations? Please show the top 10 with examples.
Looking at the last three years, which TechnologyClass1 categories occur most often among target-pair combinations? Return the top 10 and representative pairs.
